name: cursor-plugins
description: Official Cursor plugin marketplace: developer tools, framework rules, MCP integrations, and agent skills

plugins.name: teaching
plugins.description: Skill mapping, practice plans, and learning retrospectives.

plugins.name: continual-learning
plugins.description: Incremental transcript-driven memory updates for AGENTS.md using high-signal bullet points only.

plugins.name: cursor-team-kit
plugins.description: Internal team workflows used by Cursor developers for CI, code review, shipping, local automation, and verification.

plugins.name: create-plugin
plugins.description: Scaffold and validate new Cursor plugins.

plugins.name: ralph-loop
plugins.description: Iterative self-referential AI loops using the Ralph Wiggum technique.

plugins.name: agent-compatibility
plugins.description: CLI-backed repo compatibility scans plus Cursor agents that audit startup, validation, and docs against reality.

plugins.name: cli-for-agent
plugins.description: Patterns for designing CLIs that coding agents can run reliably: flags, help with examples, pipelines, errors, idempotency, dry-run.

plugins.name: pr-review-canvas
plugins.description: Render PR diffs as interactive Cursor Canvases organized for reviewer comprehension — groups changes by importance, separates boilerplate from core logic, and highlights tricky or unexpected code.

plugins.name: docs-canvas
plugins.description: Render documentation — architecture notes, API references, runbooks, and codebase walkthroughs — as a navigable Cursor Canvas with sections, table of contents, diagrams, and cross-references.

plugins.name: cursor-sdk
plugins.description: Build apps, scripts, CI pipelines, and automations on top of the Cursor TypeScript SDK (@cursor/sdk) — runtime selection, auth, streaming, MCP, error handling, and ready-to-extend integration patterns.
